top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Turkcell Granfondo Izmir's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before October.
65 miles on mixed terrain burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
Turkcell Granfondo Izmir's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 65 miles.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Turkcell Granfondo Izmir's mixed terrain rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Turkcell Granfondo Izmir, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Base fitness for Turkcell Granfondo Izmir. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
2-minute all-out efforts on mixed terrain. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Turkcell Granfondo Izmir. Train it until it feels boring.
At Turkcell Granfondo Izmir, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what Turkcell Granfondo Izmir's mixed terrain actually does to you.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mixed terrain at tempo for 65 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.

race_overlay.heat: October in Izmir, Turkey can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Turkcell Granfondo Izmir. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Turkcell Granfondo Izmir’s 65 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Turkcell Granfondo Izmir requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, Durability, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 65 miles of mixed terrain in Izmir, Turkey.
